zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏多结构延续
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD整体维持温和上行结构，价格稳站20日均线之上，短期由反弹进入高位震荡阶段，市场情绪偏多但动能略有放缓。运行特征明显延续性较强

MACD指标维持正值0.62附近，说明多头动能仍占优势，但柱体扩张有限，短期缺乏强趋势加速信号，RSI缺失使超买判断不完整需观察后续确认

下方支撑位集中在72.6与72.2区域，若失守可能回测70整数关口；上方阻力位在74.3附近，一旦有效突破或打开至76空间

操作上建议以回踩均线分批布局为主，若跌破72区域需控制风险；上行突破74.3可考虑顺势加仓，整体偏震荡偏多思路结构延续中

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is maintaining a mild short-term bullish structure, trading at 74.1 after a modest 0.69% gain in the last 24 hours. Price action shows consolidation just below the recent intraday high of 74.28, suggesting market indecision near resistance. The broader structure remains supported by higher lows above the 72.6 zone, indicating buyers are still defending dips despite limited upside momentum.

Momentum indicators lean cautiously bullish, with MACD reading at 0.623 suggesting positive short-term momentum, although the missing signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. Price remains above the 20-period simple moving average at 72.214, reinforcing an underlying uptrend bias. However, the relatively narrow spread between price and moving average indicates the trend is still developing rather than fully established, leaving room for consolidation.

Immediate resistance is located at 74.28, with a breakout above this level potentially opening the path toward 75.00 and then 78.00. On the downside, initial support sits at 72.60, aligned closely with the SMA20 at 72.214, forming a strong demand zone. A breakdown below this area could expose deeper support near 70.00, shifting bias to neutral. Market participants are likely to watch this zone closely for directional confirmation.

Short-term trading conditions favor range-bound strategies between 72.6 support and 74.28 resistance, with breakout confirmation required for trend continuation trades. Aggressive traders may consider buying near support with tight stops below 72.2, while breakout traders should wait for a sustained close above 74.3. Risk management remains crucial given the still-developing momentum structure and limited indicator confirmation. Position sizing should remain moderate until a clearer directional breakout emerges.
